div1.entryFree: Trample, to stamp, to paw: a breeding jennet . . . Adonis' --ing courser doth espy, Ven. 261. With on, == to tread on in contempt: --ing contemptuously on thy disdain, Gent. I, 2, 112. t. on their sovereign's head, R2 III, 3, 157. o'errun and --d on, Troil. III, 3, 163. Trans. in the same sense: which with usurping steps do t. thee, R2 III, 2, 17.
